name: Provider Fallback Resolver
description: Resolves provider/model fallback after a provider failure and returns an auditable provider_fallback_trace with requested, selected, failed, fallback, rejected, capability, and permission-scope details.

inputSchema.name: Requested Model Ref
inputSchema.description: Requested provider/model ref, such as openai/gpt-primary.

inputSchema.name: Failure Event
inputSchema.description: Provider failure event with model_ref, provider_id, error_type, and message.

inputSchema.name: Provider Candidates
inputSchema.description: Ordered provider/model candidates with capabilities, permissions, enabled, and configured flags.

inputSchema.name: Required Capabilities
inputSchema.description: Required model capabilities, for example chat or structured_output.

inputSchema.name: Required Permissions
inputSchema.description: Required permission scope. Fallbacks with additional permissions are rejected by default.

inputSchema.name: Preserve Permission Scope
inputSchema.description: Whether fallback must avoid expanding provider permission scope.
